choose.when: and EXISTS(select y.id from lkt_product_list y where y.product_class like concat('%-',x.cid,'-%') and x.recycle=0 and y.mch_id=#{mchId})

mapper.select:
select a.id,a.store_id,a.type0,a.type,a.url,a.status,a.parameter_status,a.parameter,a.add_date,a.sid
,x.pname name ,x.product_title name ,x.name
from lkt_jump_path a
right join lkt_product_class x on a.sid = x.cid and x.recycle=0 and x.is_display=1 right join lkt_product_list x on a.sid = x.id and x.recycle=0 and x.mch_status =2 and x.status=2 right join lkt_mch x on a.sid = x.id and x.recovery=0 and x.review_status = 1
and x.level=0 and x.recycle = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id and x.recycle = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id and x.recovery = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id
add_date ${add_date_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select count(1) from lkt_jump_path
right join lkt_product_class x on a.sid = x.cid and x.recycle=0 and x.is_display=1 right join lkt_product_list x on a.sid = x.id and x.recycle=0 and x.mch_status =2 and x.status=2 right join lkt_mch x on a.sid = x.id and x.recovery=0
and x.level=0 and x.recycle = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id and x.recycle = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id and x.recovery = 0 and x.store_id=a.store_id
select name,CONCAT('shop_id=', id) AS parameter,id as sid from lkt_mch where recovery=0 and review_status = 1 and store_id = #{store_id}
